There is an entry for apples here, but I don’t see any. Instead, an old persimmon tree in a gully with maybe 6 or so fruits on it. Could possibly reach a few from the sidewalk if you brought a tool. Lots of poison ivy and multiflora rose thorns on the slope, s

This native persimmon tree drops copious amounts of fruit after the first frost onto public property, near the Fairfax County Judicial complex. Park around the corner at the Post Office and walk up. If the fruit is ripe, you will see it littering the ground. F
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
